metadata.description: A portable agent skill that makes any AI coding assistant an expert at building agentic tooling: skills, hooks, MCP servers, subagents, commands, context engineering, and security.

plugins.name: foundry
plugins.description: Reviews and builds agentic tooling to best practice across any AI coding assistant. Catches the mistakes assistants actually make when writing skills, hooks, MCP servers, subagents, and commands.
